title: TRANSITION HOUSING - 211info
text: FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT TRANSITION HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost housing to men and women in the early stages of sobriety who are in transition to the next level of recovery. 1021 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 776-7086 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 776-7086 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred. Walk in or call for more information. FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: Varies by property AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind main office. Access possible from E Main Street or Reddy Avenue Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
